segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Lisa, you've been taking guitar lessons, right? How's that going? It's good. I'm having fun, and there are four or five songs I can play pretty well. Now I've been thinking about it myself. I just finished a big work project, so I've got some spare time. If you'll wait here a minute, I'll give you my teacher's information. She's great. Do you do it online or in person? I took a few lessons in person to get started. It's helpful to have someone show you some basic things. But now we do it online and it works well.
